name: Sogni LLM Tool Calling Object Guessing Game

parameters.content:
## Sogni LLM Tool Calling: Object Guessing Game

Pick a secret object from the built-in catalog and Sogni LLM will try to guess it in 20 moves using tool calls.

### Flow
1. Submit a secret object in the form
2. Pick the most available chat model
3. Let the model call local game-master tools
4. Loop until the model guesses correctly or runs out of moves
5. Show the full move log on the completion page

### Why this matters
- Demonstrates repeated OpenAI-style `tools` and `tool_choice`
- Shows how to loop tool calls across multiple LLM turns in n8n
- Keeps the secret object hidden from the model while the local tool answers questions

parameters.formDescription: Enter one secret object from this list and Sogni LLM will try to guess it in 20 moves: umbrella, toaster, skateboard, telescope, pineapple, backpack, candle, keyboard, bicycle, mug.

nodes.name: Ask For Secret Object
nodes.notes: Submit one of the built-in catalog objects to start the guessing game

nodes.name: Build Guessing Game
nodes.notes: Validates the chosen secret object and prepares the multi-turn tool-calling game state

nodes.name: Request Next Move
nodes.notes: Requests the next tool call from Sogni LLM

nodes.name: Execute Local Tool
nodes.notes: Runs the local game-master tool, updates the transcript, and decides whether the game is over

nodes.name: Game Complete?
nodes.notes: Loops back for another move until the game is complete

nodes.name: Format Result Page
nodes.notes: Formats the guessing-game result for the n8n form completion page

nodes.name: Show Result Page
nodes.notes: Shows the full guessing-game transcript on the built-in n8n completion page
